rulings.Case Title: JAMES SWAN VS. INGERSOLL-RAND COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 7, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Brayton Purcell LLP's, Nancy Williams' motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff James Swan is continued on the court's own motion to January 14, 2016. = (503/TLJ)
